## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case
Why is this feature needed? How does it help CORF compliance workflows?

## CORF Reference
If applicable, reference the relevant CORF section or requirement.

## Module
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Assessment
- [ ] SoA Builder
- [ ] Tier Calculator
- [ ] Remediation Tracker
- [ ] Reporting
- [ ] API
- [ ] New Module

## Proposed Solution
How should this work?

## Additional Context
Any mockups, examples, or references.
